figures.caption: Fig. 1. Top to bottom: (i) The training pipeline learning to auto-encode only with table-top high-quality fundus images and (ii) the inference pipeline performing restoration through inpainting with fundus images from handheld devices.
Table 1. Quantification of our restoration output along with the comparative baselines for the Test and Synthetic Set.
Fig. 2. Left to right: Comparison of restored images from various models. Top to bottom: Synthetic and Original artifact restorations. Green boxes highlight the region of artifact.
